commandMatrix.purpose: Check required local tooling.
Summarize repo and runtime health.
Run the no-secret owner-host install preflight and install validation proof.
Start the private live-profile node and RPC service.
Verify node, control-plane, height, and state freshness.
Observe block production over a sampling window.
Restart without deleting runtime state.
Prove upgrade and rollback preserve local L1 state without host mutation.
Stop local services without deleting state.
Prove the supervisor can recover a failed local control plane.
Render the no-secret Windows Scheduled Task install plan.
Validate install/status/uninstall paths without mutating the owner host.
Render the no-secret Linux systemd install plan from owner-rendered units.
Render the explicit Linux bridge-relayer opt-in systemd supervisor plan without mutating the owner host.
Validate Linux systemd live-service and supervisor install plans without mutating the owner host.
Create and verify the no-secret offline second-computer source bundle.
Regenerate the owner setup map and clarify that FlowChain public RPC is repo-owned.
List exactly what the owner must sign up for or create before public launch.
Generate the current ordered launch activation plan and exact validation commands.
Generate the exact no-secret go-live handoff deck, next owner inputs, validation commands, and do-not-send list.
Generate the current no-secret answer to what the L1 needs now, grouped by owner action and validation command.
Create or preserve the ignored local owner env scaffold with empty values only.
Prove unsafe owner env file paths fail before live gates run.
Run live gates through the ignored owner env file and report only names and statuses.
Generate owner-host public RPC edge artifacts.
Validate render, preflight, verify, and rollback phases.
Map public RPC launch commands to owner inputs, mutation risk, rollback coverage, and evidence paths.
Run local public-profile RPC readiness validation.
Run read-only public endpoint canary probes after the owner endpoint is configured.
Render no-secret Windows and systemd recurring public RPC canary schedule plans without mutating the owner host.
Run CORS, media-type, batch/body cap, rate-limit, and response hygiene probes.
Prove restore safety and tamper rejection locally.
Exercise backup readiness with an ignored local owner-path stand-in.
Render the daily snapshot Scheduled Task plan.
Render the daily snapshot Linux systemd timer plan.
Validate Linux systemd backup and restore-drill timer plans without mutating the owner host.
Validate Windows and Linux backup scheduler plan/status/uninstall behavior.
Classify critical incidents separately from owner-input blockers.
Refresh local alert rules and finding coverage.
Export no-secret JSON and Prometheus textfile metrics for owner collectors.
Render recurring metrics export Scheduled Task plan.
Render recurring metrics export Linux systemd timer plan.
Validate Linux systemd timer metrics export plan without mutating the owner host.
Validate Windows and Linux recurring metrics export scheduler plan/status/uninstall behavior.
Render recurring alert refresh Scheduled Task plan.
Render recurring alert refresh Linux systemd timer plan.
Validate Linux systemd timer alert refresh plan without mutating the owner host.
Rehearse node, RPC, stale-state, stalled-height, and no-secret incidents.
Run the no-broadcast relayer gate; remains blocked until owner Base inputs exist.
Map bridge deploy, observe, relayer, credit, release, and emergency-control commands to owner inputs, acknowledgement gates, risk class, and evidence paths.
Scan generated bridge pilot evidence for secret-shaped material before owner-funded bridge activation.
Validate Base 8453 deploy, pause, resume, and emergency-stop gates fail closed without owner env and require broadcast acknowledgements.
Prove missing owner inputs cannot mutate cursor state or queue credits.
Validate relayer loop start, fresh health reporting, clean stop, PID cleanup, and no leftover validation relayer process.
Validate a production-shaped Base 8453 handoff becomes spendable, transferable, replay-safe, and restart/export/import-safe in isolated L1 state.
Run the bounded aggregate pilot proof across contracts, bridge, runtime, wallet, control-dashboard, and ops before owner-funded pilot approval.
Reconcile live relayer counts, cursor safety, runtime credit proof, replay rejection, and release evidence into one bridge operator report.
Render no-secret Windows and systemd recurring bridge reconciliation schedule plans without mutating the owner host.
Validate withdrawal/release evidence matching, mismatch rejection, and no-broadcast boundaries.
Regenerate the friends-and-family packet and fail closed until public gates pass.
Validate the packet and connect pack are no-secret, locally executable, and not externally shareable before owner inputs.
Validate redacted friends-and-family evidence intake for block-height advancement, wallet transfer consistency, and no-secret boundaries.
Create or preserve the raw tester bearer token in ignored local storage and write only its digest to the ignored owner env file.
Run desktop and mobile browser verification for tester wallet create, faucet, send, Explorer inspection, tester launch readiness, and the L1 activation cockpit.
Run owner-env, public deployment, local tester wallet network, tester packet, completion, truth table, and no-secret gates as one redacted rehearsal.
Verify the generated operator package contents and no-secret boundary.
Run the production readiness gate without false public-ready claims.
Classify every tracked gate as passed, owner-blocked, repo-blocked, failed, or stale.
Verify generated reports and packets contain no secret markers.
